projects.title: AI-Powered Invoice Extraction System
projects.description: Developed an intelligent document processing system using Gemini AI models to extract data from PDFs, images, and scanned invoices. Designed a full OCR pipeline with built-in validation and error handling for diverse document formats.
highlights: Achieved 92% accuracy in automated data extraction
Full OCR pipeline with validation & error handling
Significantly reduced manual data entry effort

projects.title: Requisition Management System
projects.description: Built a full-featured requisition platform replacing a manual paper-based process. Implemented role-based dashboards for administrators, managers, accountants, and purchasers.
highlights: Cash Approval, Repair & Maintenance, Salary Advance workflows
Real-time reporting & analytics for material requests

projects.title: Office Checklist & Task Management
projects.description: Developed a task assignment and tracking system replacing a manual oversight process. Implemented approval workflows with real-time Google Sheets synchronization.
highlights: Reduced task follow-up time with automated notifications
